description: ANALYST re-proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 pending AUDITOR decision. All five smoke-e2e validation checks were completed by CLOUD_CODE (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9) and independently documented in governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json. Validated artifacts on main branch: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter — commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5; (2) auditor-runner.yml server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED — commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae; (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing — commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26; (4) governance/ledger/ ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. ANALYST asserts all autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied. AUDITOR must issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED based on independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and all referenced workflow files on main branch. VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED closes TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 and advances the system to the next roadmap phase. VERIFICATION_FAILED requires ANALYST to identify and remediate the specific failing check before re-proposal.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch with pass status across all five validation checks; .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml containing both dispatch role filter and PRE_ACTION_APPROVED-gated current_task.json update; .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing; governance/ledger/ ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs
